_comment: Camel Runner — Ad Configuration. Replace placeholder IDs with production values before release.

adMob._note_contentFilter: G rating + category blocklist set in AdMob dashboard → Blocking controls → Sensitive categories. Programmatic maxAdContentRating(G) also applied at SDK init.

unityAds._note_contentFilter: Set content rating to Everyone/Family in Unity Ads dashboard → Project → Ad Quality → Content maturity.

ironSource._note_setup: Configure waterfall in LevelPlay (ironSource) dashboard. AdMob and Unity Ads adapters must be added as demand partners there.
ironSource._note_contentFilter: Enable Brand Safety in LevelPlay dashboard → Ad Quality → Block lists. Block: Gambling, Alcohol, Dating, Adult.

adFrequency._note: Rewarded ads are opt-in only; frequency cap applies to avoid burnout.

revive.description: Continue run after game-over (full health restore + resume)

doubleCoins.description: Double coins earned during the completed run

rewardCompletion._note: Rewards fire ONLY from the SDK's OnUserEarnedReward / onRewardedVideoAdRewardedEvent callback. Skipped or closed-without-completion ads do not grant rewards.
